mapper.sql: GOODS_ID, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_ATTRIBUTE_ID, GOODS_ATTRIBUTE, GOODS_NUM, GOODS_TOTAL, GOODS_PRICE, USERNAME, REALNAME, ADDTIME, SHOPPINGCAR_ID
mapper.update:
update
set
GOODS_ID = #{GOODS_ID},
GOODS_NAME = #{GOODS_NAME},
GOODS_ATTRIBUTE_ID = #{GOODS_ATTRIBUTE_ID},
GOODS_ATTRIBUTE = #{GOODS_ATTRIBUTE},
GOODS_NUM = #{GOODS_NUM},
GOODS_TOTAL = #{GOODS_TOTAL},
GOODS_PRICE = #{GOODS_PRICE},
USERNAME = #{USERNAME},
REALNAME = #{REALNAME},
ADDTIME = #{ADDTIME},
SHOPPINGCAR_ID = SHOPPINGCAR_ID where SHOPPINGCAR_ID = #{SHOPPINGCAR_ID}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT s.USERNAME as USER_ID,u.NAME,u.USERNAME,u.PHONE,u.SEX,u.SFID FROM shop_shoppingcar s LEFT JOIN sys_app_user u ON s.USERNAME = u.USER_ID where 1 = 1
and (
s.GOODS_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{pd.keywords}),'%') )
and s.USERNAME = #{pd.USERNAME}
